# Planner Decisions — Surgical Sensor Line

*Generated by `planning/planner.py` from customer requirements.*

## Inputs

| Input | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Product | Surgical Sensor |
| Daily output | 150/day |
| Automation | semi |
| Floor area | 280 m² |
| Workers | 6 |
| Quality | optical, functional |
| Regulated | True |
| Budget | medium |

## Decisions

| Decision | Result | Rule | Rationale |
|----------|--------|------|-----------|
| Automation tier | semi | automation_level.level (normalized) | Declared automation is 'semi'; 25 units/worker/day → tier drives which automated stations are viable. |
| Parallel assembly | 1 | single station meets takt | One assembly station (cap ≈ 480/shift) covers 150/day. |
| Robot handling cell | NO | low automation & throughput | Automation 'semi' and 150/day do not justify a robot → no robot cell. |
| Vision inspection | YES | quality mentions ['optical', 'vision', 'camera', 'high'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | Quality/regulatory needs objective optical inspection → include vision. |
| Functional test | YES | quality mentions ['functional', 'electrical', 'test', 'flow'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | Functional/regulated requirement → per-unit end-of-line test. |
| Compact layout | NO | area ≤ 150 m² | Ample 280 m² floor → standard spacing. |
| Floor-area feasibility | 34.0 | sum(station area) ≤ available area | Stations need ≈ 34 m²; available 280 m². |

## Resulting line (6 stations, standard layout)

- **S01** — Loading Station
- **S02** — Assisted Assembly Station
- **S03** — Vision Inspection Station
- **S04** — Functional Test Station
- **S05** — Packaging Station
- **S06** — Finished Goods Storage

Flow: S01 → S02 → S03 → S04 → S05 → S06  (+X)
